mapper.sql: id, order_number, program_id, program_item_picture, user_id, program_title, program_place, program_show_time, program_permit_choose_seat, distribution_mode, take_ticket_mode, order_price, pay_order_type, order_status, expire_time, create_order_time, cancel_order_time, pay_order_time, create_time, edit_time, status
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO d_order (order_number, program_id, program_item_picture, user_id, program_title, program_place, program_show_time, program_permit_choose_seat, distribution_mode, take_ticket_mode, order_price, pay_order_type, order_status, expire_time, create_order_time, cancel_order_time, pay_order_time, create_time, edit_time, status) VALUES (#{orderNumber}, #{programId}, #{programItemPicture}, #{userId}, #{programTitle}, #{programPlace}, #{programShowTime}, #{programPermitChooseSeat}, #{distributionMode}, #{takeTicketMode}, #{orderPrice}, #{payOrderType}, #{orderStatus}, #{expireTime}, #{createOrderTime}, #{cancelOrderTime}, #{payOrderTime}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{status})

INSERT INTO d_order_ticket_user (order_number, program_id, user_id, ticket_user_id, seat_id, seat_info, ticket_category_id, order_price, pay_order_price, pay_order_type, order_status, create_order_time, cancel_order_time, pay_order_time, create_time, edit_time, status) VALUES
(#{item.orderNumber}, #{item.programId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.ticketUserId}, #{item.seatId}, #{item.seatInfo}, #{item.ticketCategoryId}, #{item.orderPrice}, #{item.payOrderPrice}, #{item.payOrderType}, #{item.orderStatus}, #{item.createOrderTime}, #{item.cancelOrderTime}, #{item.payOrderTime}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt}, #{item.status})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM d_order WHERE order_number = #{orderNumber} AND status = 1

SELECT id, order_number, program_id, user_id, ticket_user_id, seat_id, seat_info, ticket_category_id, order_price, pay_order_price, pay_order_type, order_status, create_order_time, cancel_order_time, pay_order_time, create_time, edit_time, status FROM d_order_ticket_user WHERE order_number = #{orderNumber} AND status = 1 ORDER BY id ASC
